item.description: Hi, I am Aaron Wasserman! I graduated from Georgia Tech with a B.S. in Computer Engineering in 2021, and stuck around to pursue a M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering. In my time at Georgia Tech, I’ve thoroughly enjoyed my coursework in malware reverse engineering and analysis, cryptographic hardware for embedded systems, and cyber-physical systems security. I’m hoping to start a career in the security space following my graduation in December 2022.
